'''鈭歬-f-ch-y''' ('''kakafcheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lumpen|lumpen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lumpen|lumpen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-f-ch-y
|-
! Lemma
| kakafcheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikafcheyoko|thikafcheyoko]] || [[word:jikafcheyoko|jikafcheyoko]] || [[word:shikafcheyoko|shikafcheyoko]] || [[word:kikafcheyoko|kikafcheyoko]]
|-
